special_mechanics.name: Equipment System
special_mechanics.description: Player acquires increasingly powerful swords, spears, shields, suits of armor, and boots that affect traversal and combat capabilities

special_mechanics.name: Companion Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Regional companion characters provide situational assistance (healing, wall breaking, enemy attacks)

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics overview but no quantitative physics parameters. TCRF source inaccessible due to content restriction policy. No ROM data, frame data, or precise movement values documented in available sources.
